hero.title: GhostDrive
hero.subtitle: Your private storage, like OneDrive
hero.description: Free and open source Windows sync client for your private storage backends. End vendor lock-in — your data stays with you.
problems.title: The problem
problems.subtitle: Current solutions lock you into a closed ecosystem
problems.1.title: Vendor lock-in
problems.1.desc: Google Drive, OneDrive, iDrive — your data is held hostage on their servers. Switching providers means migrating everything manually, with proprietary formats and closed APIs.
problems.2.title: Limited and costly quota
problems.2.desc: A few free gigabytes, then monthly subscriptions for storage you already own on your NAS or home server.
problems.3.title: Private backends out of reach
problems.3.desc: You have a NAS, MooseFS, a WebDAV server, Ceph? Windows can't mount them natively with a Files On-Demand experience. Rclone is powerful but lacks a UI, placeholders, and automatic sync.
solutions.title: The GhostDrive solution
solutions.subtitle: Same experience as OneDrive, towards your own backends
solutions.1.solution: Open plugin architecture — WebDAV, MooseFS, S3, CephFS and more
solutions.2.solution: Open source, self-hosted — you control your infrastructure
solutions.3.problem: No Files On-Demand on private backends
solutions.3.solution: Native Windows Cloud Filter API — real placeholders, on-demand downloads
solutions.4.solution: Native Windows interface with system tray icon, notifications and visual settings
features.title: Features
features.subtitle: Everything OneDrive offers, towards your own storage
features.1.title: Files On-Demand
features.1.desc: Files appear in Explorer without being downloaded. Access them on demand via Cloud Filter API — exactly like OneDrive.
features.2.title: Bidirectional sync
features.2.desc: Local changes propagate to the backend, and vice versa. Built-in conflict resolution.
features.3.title: Local cache
features.3.desc: Enable the cache to access your files offline. Automatic sync on reconnection.
features.4.title: Plugin architecture
features.4.desc: Each storage backend is a compiled Go plugin. Add WebDAV, MooseFS, S3, or implement your own via the StorageBackend interface.
features.5.title: Simple distribution
features.5.desc: A single Windows binary, no complex setup. Prerequisite: WinFsp for system-level placeholders.
roadmap.title: Roadmap
roadmap.subtitle: Each version delivers one complete, usable feature
roadmap.group.v1.label: V1
roadmap.group.v1.title: Foundations
roadmap.group.v1.desc: Sync engine, UI, backends and distribution
roadmap.group.v2.label: V2
roadmap.group.v2.title: Multi-client
roadmap.group.v2.desc: Multiple machines syncing to the same backend
roadmap.group.v3.label: V3
roadmap.group.v3.title: Advanced security
roadmap.v100.title: Sync Engine
roadmap.v100.desc: Bidirectional sync engine — file watcher, queue, upload/download, conflict resolution
roadmap.v110.title: Systray UI
roadmap.v110.desc: Native Windows interface — system tray icon, backend configuration, sync points, real-time status
roadmap.v120.title: WebDAV Plugin
roadmap.v120.desc: First storage backend — Basic/Digest authentication, compatible with Synology NAS, TrueNAS, Nextcloud
roadmap.v130.title: MooseFS Plugin
roadmap.v130.desc: Second backend — native Go MooseFS client for distributed storage infrastructures
roadmap.v140.title: Files On-Demand Placeholders
roadmap.v140.desc: Cloud Filter API + WinFsp — files visible in Explorer without disk usage, on-demand hydration
roadmap.v150.title: Local Cache
roadmap.v150.desc: LRU architecture, toggleable per sync point — offline access to frequently used files
roadmap.v160.title: CI/CD & Distribution
roadmap.v160.desc: GitHub Actions — automated builds for Windows AMD64 + Linux ARM64, published to GitHub Releases
roadmap.v200.title: Multi-client
roadmap.v200.desc: Distributed lock protocol, multi-device conflict management, centralized status dashboard
roadmap.v300.title: Zero-knowledge encryption
roadmap.v300.desc: AES-256-GCM + Argon2id, keys in Windows Credential Manager — the backend never sees your data in plaintext
roadmap.v310.title: File versioning
roadmap.v310.desc: Per-file version history, restore a previous version directly from the systray interface
install.title: Install from source
install.subtitle: No binaries released yet — the project is under active development
install.prereq.title: Prerequisites
install.note: Precompiled binaries will be available at the V1 release via GitHub Releases.
comparison.title: Comparison
comparison.subtitle: Why GhostDrive?
footer.desc: Free Windows sync client for your private storage backends.
